title: Gevo Secures Conditional Commitment from U.S. Department of Energy Loan Programs Office for its Net-Zero 1 Sustainable Aviation Fuel Plant in South Dakota
content: Gevo Inc., a leading developer of net-zero hydrocarbon fuels and chemicals, has received a conditional commitment for a loan guarantee with disbursements totaling $1.46 billion (excluding capitalized interest during construction) from the U.S. Department of Energy (â€œDOEâ€) Loan Programs Office (â€œLPOâ€) for its Net-Zero 1 project (â€œNZ1â€) in South Dakota.
author: Analysts Account
